name: procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month, maverick buying causes untracked spending. We provide a procurement analytics dashboard instead of manual tracking spreadsheets.
